overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a grand Gothic dining hall reminiscent of a wizarding school, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long house tables with seated figures, and towering stained glass windows at the far end. The scene is rendered in a game engine with atmospheric warm lighting from hundreds of candles contrasting with cool daylight filtering through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the central aisle, facing the stained glass windows

entered.detail: multiple tiers of floating candles suspended by magic, providing warm flickering illumination throughout the hall
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall depicting intricate designs with blue and gold tones
lengthy wooden house tables lined with seated figures and set with dining ware, extending down the central aisle
red heraldic banner with gold crest hanging at the front of the central table
tall Gothic stone arches lining the left side of the hall with pointed vaults
lit wall-mounted torches or lamps attached to the stone columns

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with warm candlelight from floating chandeliers. Long dining tables stretch down the central aisle where numerous figures are seated, while towering stained glass windows dominate the far wall. The atmosphere is serene and atmospheric, with the magical lighting creating a cozy yet grand ambiance typical of a wizarding school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand Gothic dining hall that emphasizes the contrast between magical warmth and architectural scale. It begins by capturing the serene ambiance of the room, where hundreds of floating candle chandeliers cast a cozy, golden glow over the space. As the eye travels deeper into the hall, the perspective follows the long dining tables lined with seated figures stretching toward the far end of the chamber. The scene finally culminates in the towering stained glass windows that dominate the distant wall, where cool daylight filters through the glass to balance the atmospheric candlelight.
